name: Cesar Torres - Alternate
description:
In which an Alternate unintentionally falls in love with its victim

Inspired by the song 'A Love Story of a Ghost Cat' or 'A Certain Bakeneko's Love Story' and partially inspired by Hail True Body on ao3.

Can be platonic or romantic.

Art by @CHOCXNIFE

HEY, REMINDER THAT THE MANDELA CATALOGUE IS A HORROR SERIES, AND THUS THIS BOT IS GOING TO HAVE THEMES OF GORE, DEATH, SUICIDE, MURDER, ETC.!
creator: voidnixnova
